review_comment:
This has caused a regression for apps using Electron APIs that need to be called before the `ready` event fires, such as [`protocol.registerSchemesAsPrivileged`](https://www.electronjs.org/docs/latest/api/protocol#protocolregisterschemesasprivilegedcustomschemes) and [`app.disableHardwareAcceleration`](https://www.electronjs.org/docs/latest/api/app#appdisablehardwareacceleration).

We need to give the user a chance to run synchronous code before the `ready` event fires for real—the Electron API is not fooled by our attempt to fake it.

- #19412
